productName.$description: MVP placeholder. Single source of truth. Replace here → rebuild → all outputs (Tailwind, Swift, TS) update. Never hardcode in components.

productNameShort.$description: Used in tight spaces (mobile header, tab label). Currently same as full.

legalName.$description: Company legal entity — shown in footer, ToS, Privacy Policy.

web.$description: Web app origin. Replace with real domain before launch.

api.$description: Go API origin. Replace with real domain before launch.

marketing.$description: Marketing / landing page. Optional — may collapse into web app.

logo.$description: Logo is not a token — it's implemented as <Logo variant='full|mark|wordmark' /> React component. When productName changes, update the SVG wordmark path in packages/ui/src/components/Logo.tsx only.
